supply_chain.dependencies: Single-source unaffiliated third-party suppliers for certain raw materials; reliance on collaborators and third parties for filling, finishing, packaging, labeling, distribution, and laboratory testing; dependence on China-based suppliers for certain raw materials, products, and services
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain interruptions or constraints; contaminations; fire; climate change; natural disasters; acts of war or terrorism; business interruptions; labor shortages or disputes; regional or single-source dependencies; geopolitical developments between United States and China; potential impact of BIOSECURE Act or similar legislation restricting China-based suppliers

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory approval requirements and delays
EMA regulatory requirements in European Union
Risk Evaluation and Mitigation Strategy (REMS) requirements
Medicaid Drug Rebate program compliance and reporting obligations
Medicare Part B and Part D pricing and rebate requirements
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) drug price negotiation program
GDPR data protection requirements in EU
Environmental, health, and safety laws and regulations
OECD Pillar Two minimum tax framework
Prescription Drug Affordability Boards and state pricing controls
Patent litigation and intellectual property challenges

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine armed conflict impact on clinical trials and operations
Hamas-Israel armed conflict impact on clinical trials and operations
U.S.-China trade tensions and potential tariffs
Potential restrictions on China-based suppliers due to BIOSECURE Act or similar legislation
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions compliance
Trade embargoes and sanctions affecting international operations
Russian government decree allowing exploitation of patents without compensation
